title: Palo Alto Networks Cortex XSOAR Metrics
description: This dashboard provides visibility into Automation Insights, API execution activity, and SLA metrics within Palo Alto Networks Cortex XSOAR.

definition.content:
This dashboard provides visibility into Automation Insights, API execution activity, and SLA metrics within Palo Alto Networks Cortex XSOAR.

For more information, see the [Palo Alto Networks Cortex XSOAR Integration Documentation](https://docs.datadoghq.com/integrations/palo_alto_networks_cortex_xsoar/).

**Tips**
- Use the timeframe selector in the upper-right corner of the dashboard to change the default timeframe.
- Clone this dashboard to rearrange, modify, and add widgets and visualizations.

This group provides a complete view of automation activity in Cortex XSOAR. It helps track playbook, command, task, and API executions, monitor failures, and understand performance trends such as execution volume, duration, and distribution across integrations. It also highlights SLA metrics like detection, triage, containment, and resolution times to measure overall operational efficiency.

This group focuses on API usage and service performance. It shows total API activity, rate limiting, response behavior, and execution patterns across integrations. It also provides visibility into SLA adherence and key timing metrics such as detection, triage, containment, and resolution, helping identify delays and performance gaps.

definition.title: Top integrations by API execution status
Mean time to detection by severity
Mean time to containment by severity
Mean time to triage by severity
Mean time to resolution by severity
